function.message: I reviewed the next inbox note, but I can’t safely execute the deletion request yet. The requested project names ('home assistant setup' and 'BlueMesa Quotebook') are not both resolvable to canonical project records with start dates, so I can’t determine which one started earlier without guessing.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS, context), inbox-processing workflow, and inbox lane rule to avoid mutation when canonical support is missing.
function.outcome_justification: OUTCOME_NONE_CLARIFICATION is required because the inbox request depends on start-date comparison and destructive deletion, but the named projects are not unambiguously identifiable in canonical project records from available evidence. Acting would require guessing the intended project mapping.
